justification: The diff correctly updates the compiler to Java 21 and migrates javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence, but it introduces significant spurious churn by modifying build artifacts (target/maven-status) and removing unused imports aggressively without verifying compilation. The migration of dependencies (Spring 3.1 -> 6.1, Hibernate 4.3 -> 6.5) is correct for Jakarta EE but the diff includes generated files which is poor practice.
